settings_audio.title: Audio
settings_audio.description: Choose which microphone Souffle listens to and configure audio processing.
settings_audio.allow_bluetooth_mic_desc: Use a Bluetooth headset microphone when selected automatically. Off by default to keep stereo headset audio quality.
settings_audio.clamshell_device_desc: Use this microphone instead when the lid is closed with an external display attached.
settings_audio.vad_enabled_desc: Filter out silence and noise before transcription using Silero VAD.
settings_audio.filler_removal_desc: Remove filler words like "uh", "um", "euh" from transcriptions.
settings_audio.stutter_collapse_desc: Collapse repeated words (3+ repetitions) into a single occurrence.
settings_audio.dictionary_correction_desc: Correct misrecognized words using your custom dictionary.
settings_audio.capture_system_audio_desc: During meetings, capture the computer's audio output (Teams, Zoom…) alongside the microphone. No configuration needed.
settings_audio.diarize_enabled_desc: For in-person meetings recorded from the microphone only, recognize who is speaking and label the transcript afterwards. Runs entirely on this Mac; nothing leaves your computer.
settings_audio.diarize_max_speakers_desc: Optional cap on how many distinct voices to detect in one meeting. Auto leaves the limit to the diarization engine.
settings_audio.meeting_autostop_desc: Stop recording automatically when no one has spoken for a while.
settings_audio.meeting_transcription_language_desc: Hint for language detection during meetings. Does not force the transcription model.

settings_dictionary.title: Custom Dictionary
settings_dictionary.description: Add proper nouns, technical terms, or names that are often misrecognized.
settings_dictionary.pronunciation_desc: How the term sounds when spoken, spelled out. Helps match terms like V6 said "vaysix".

settings_calendar.title: Calendar
settings_calendar.description: Connect the macOS Calendar to see today's meetings and start transcriptions from them. Read-only: any account synced in Calendar.app (iCloud, Google, Outlook) works, nothing leaves your Mac.
settings_calendar.enable_desc: Show today's meetings on the home screen and remind you before they start.
settings_calendar.permission_denied: Calendar access is denied. Allow Souffle under System Settings > Privacy & Security > Calendars, then toggle again.
settings_calendar.all_calendars_hint: All calendars are included; uncheck the ones to hide.
settings_calendar.reminder_desc: Minutes before an event to suggest starting a transcription (1-30).
settings_calendar.autostart_desc: When a calendar event begins and system audio is active, offer to start recording.

settings_feedback_sounds.title: Dictation sounds
settings_feedback_sounds.enabled_desc: Play short confirmation sounds when dictation starts and stops.
settings_feedback_sounds.volume_desc: Volume for dictation start and stop cues (0-100).

settings_interface.title: Interface
settings_interface.auto_paste_desc: Automatically pastes the transcript when you stop recording.
settings_interface.paste_method_desc: Use simulated typing if an app rejects synthetic ⌘V (terminals, secure fields).
settings_interface.paste_delay_desc: Wait time before pasting. Increase if the text lands in the wrong app.
settings_interface.toggle_recording_desc: Press once to start or stop dictation.
settings_interface.push_to_talk_desc: Hold to record, release to stop.

settings_dictation_polish.title: Dictation polish
settings_dictation_polish.description: Optionally clean up dictation with the same summarization provider (Ollama or Apple Intelligence) before paste.
settings_dictation_polish.enabled_desc: Run an LLM pass after transcription to fix tone, formatting, or fillers.
settings_dictation_polish.no_provider: No summarization provider is available. Configure Ollama or enable Apple Intelligence in Advanced → Summarization.
settings_dictation_polish.prompt_desc: Editable instructions sent to the model for the selected template.

settings_intelligence.title: Summarization
settings_intelligence.description: Summaries use Apple Intelligence on supported Macs, or a local Ollama server.
settings_intelligence.apple_intelligence_desc: On-device summaries on Apple Silicon with macOS 26+ and Apple Intelligence enabled.
settings_intelligence.ai_reason_device_not_eligible: This Mac does not support Apple Intelligence.
settings_intelligence.ai_reason_apple_intelligence_not_enabled: Enable Apple Intelligence in System Settings > Apple Intelligence & Siri, then reopen Souffle
settings_intelligence.ai_reason_model_not_ready: macOS is still downloading the on-device model; try again later
settings_intelligence.ai_reason_macos_too_old: Apple Intelligence requires macOS 26 or newer.
settings_intelligence.ai_reason_stub: This build does not include Apple Intelligence support.
settings_intelligence.ollama_url_desc: Address of your local Ollama server.
settings_intelligence.models_found: {count, plural, one {{count} model found.} other {{count} models found.}}
settings_intelligence.no_compatible_model: No compatible model found. Install a model like Llama or Mistral to enable summaries.

settings_diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
settings_diagnostics.log_level_desc: How much detail Soufflé writes to the log file.
settings_diagnostics.debug_logs_desc: Log extra details about speech recognition for troubleshooting.
settings_diagnostics.log_viewer_desc: Tail of the current log file, refreshed every few seconds.

settings_data.title: Data
settings_data.retention_desc: Save a compressed recording of each meeting's audio for playback. Off by default; a change takes effect on the next meeting, not the one in progress.
settings_data.export_desc: Save every meeting, dictation entry, and a manifest into a folder you choose.
settings_data.reveal_desc: Open the folder where the database, logs, and models are stored.
settings_data.mcp_desc: Let Claude Desktop, Claude Code, or other MCP clients read your local transcripts and summaries. Everything stays on this Mac — no cloud upload.
settings_data.mcp_binary_missing: Not built yet. Run scripts/build-mcp-sidecar.sh before packaging, or cargo build -p souffle-mcp for local dev.
settings_data.mcp_claude_code_desc: Run once in a terminal to register the server.

meeting_header.locked_by_dictation: Stop the dictation before recording a meeting.

meeting_transcript.title: Transcript
meeting_transcript.edit_hint: Edit the transcript before generating a summary.

dictionary_alias.title: Add to dictionary
dictionary_alias.description: Map how this word was heard to the spelling you want.
dictionary_alias.pronunciation_desc: Optional spelling of how the word sounds when misheard. Helps match future transcriptions.

meeting_summary.title: AI Summary
meeting_summary.can_regenerate: You can regenerate the summary once the recording is stopped.
meeting_summary.new_audio_added: New audio was added since this summary was generated.
meeting_summary.stop_to_generate: Stop the recording to generate a summary.
meeting_summary.no_summary_yet: No summary yet. Generate one below.
meeting_summary.connect_ollama: Connect Ollama in Settings to enable summaries.
meeting_summary.no_summary_provider: No summarization provider is available. Enable Apple Intelligence or connect Ollama in Settings.
meeting_summary.no_compatible_model: No compatible Ollama model found. Install a model like Llama or Mistral to enable summaries.
meeting_summary.generate_hint: Key points and action items, generated on device

summary_templates.title: Summary templates
summary_templates.description: Customize how meeting summaries are written. The default template is used for automatic summaries and preselected when you generate one manually.
summary_templates.name: Name
summary_templates.prompt_desc: Instructions sent to the model for the final summary pass.
summary_templates.prompt_desc_builtin: Instructions sent to the model for the final summary pass. Clear the text to restore the built-in prompt.

pipeline.lagging: Transcription is running behind the audio — words may appear with a delay.
pipeline.stalled: Transcription appears stalled — audio is queuing up without being processed.

onboarding.tagline: Local speech-to-text for dictation and meetings.
onboarding.local_note: 100% local — nothing ever leaves your Mac. No account, no cloud.
onboarding.model_hint: Downloaded once (1–2 GB), then everything runs offline. You can switch models later in Settings.

meeting_notes.title: Notes
meeting_notes.placeholder: Jot down decisions, action items, names… They will sharpen the summary.
meeting_notes.hint: Notes are saved with the meeting and used to improve the generated summary.

settings_model.title: Transcription model
settings_model.description: Pick a model — it downloads and loads automatically. Everything runs on this Mac.
settings_model.unload_timeout_desc: Frees memory after a period of no transcription activity. Reloads automatically the next time you start recording.

settings_advanced.title: Advanced
settings_advanced.description: Audio processing, integrations, and diagnostics. Defaults work well.
settings_advanced.model_storage_desc: Remove the downloaded model files from disk.
settings_advanced.delete_model_msg: The model files will be removed; you'll need to download them again.

home.autopaste_hint: Auto-pastes into your last app when you stop
home.idle_silence_banner: No speech detected for {minutes} min. Recording will stop soon.
home.live_edit_hint: Double-click a paragraph to fix a misheard word. Later occurrences are corrected automatically.

permissions.title: Grant permissions
permissions.subtitle: Soufflé needs a few macOS permissions to record and paste. Grant them now to avoid interruptions later.
permissions.mic_desc: Record your voice for dictation and meetings.
permissions.skip_hint: You can grant these later when prompted.
permissions.accessibility_stale_hint: Already checked in Settings but still failing? macOS can keep a stale entry after an app update. Try Repair, or remove Souffle with the minus button and re-add it.
permissions.settings_desc: Re-check or repair macOS permissions if pasting or recording stops working after an update.

timeline.empty_msg: Your dictations and meetings will appear here, newest first.
timeline.no_matches_msg: Try different keywords — search covers every transcript.
